summary: Phase 7C+ ForecastGuard: 11/11 backend pytest pass (100%). Frontend Manual Journal Form integration verified end-to-end: severe-banner with reason flow, none-banner hidden flow, and outlet-scoped severe scenario all working. Math correctness, severity classification, validation (400s), auth gate (401), and future-period forecast all verified.

issues: React hydration console error: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' — unrelated to forecast guard but fires on every render of the COA select. Likely the COA <option> contains a styled span. Pre-existing, NOT introduced by this iteration.

passed_tests_backend: amount=200000000 consolidated -> severity in {mild, severe} (was 'severe' +35% above 438M forecast)
Required keys present: severity, deviation_pct, mtd_amount, projected, forecast_value, ci_band, message, period
passed_tests_frontend: Save button data-testid='mje-save' present, default label 'Post JE'
Scenario A (small expense 100k consolidated): banner hidden (no severe/mild/none banner), reason TA hidden, save label 'Post JE', save enabled with balanced lines

Scenario B (severe consolidated 200M): banner visible with data-testid='forecast-guard-severe', red styling, label 'Far Above Forecast (+35.06%)', shows MTD Rp 392.772.000 / Proposed Rp 200.000.000 / Projected Rp 592.772.000 / Forecast Rp 438.896.453 ±Rp 8.699.828
Scenario B: reason textarea data-testid='mje-guard-reason' shown, save disabled
Scenario B: save label changes to 'Post (with reason)' on severe
Scenario B: typing reason -> save becomes enabled

Scenario C (outlet-scoped Altero 60M expense): banner severity='severe' (+64.94%), shows scope 'Altero — Expense Dr Rp 60.000.000 (5102)', MTD Rp 71.229.000 + Proposed Rp 60.000.000 = Projected Rp 131.229.000 vs Forecast Rp 79.561.923
Banner reflects period from entry_date.slice(0,7) (period 2026-04 shown)
Debounce ~600ms working — no API hammering during typing
action_items: LOW (pre-existing, NOT introduced by this iteration): Fix React hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' in COA select option rendering. Search for an <option> containing a <span>; replace with plain text or restructure. This is unrelated to forecast guard and was already present in earlier portals.
critical_code_review_comments: forecast_guard_service._classify(): the severe threshold uses 'projected > (forecast+band)*1.20' which means when ci_band is large, severity stays mild even for big deviations. Spec says 'severe = >20% above forecast+CI band'. Current behaviour matches spec but the multiplicative compound (band * 1.20) is slightly more permissive than strict additive '>20% above (forecast+band)'. Acceptable per current spec.

forecast_guard_service.check_expense() calls forecasting_service.forecast_series() which is ~500ms per call. With 600ms frontend debounce this is fine, but a 30s rate-limit cache layer would help when a user enters multiple Dr lines for the same outlet/brand scope. Not blocking.

ManualJournalForm.jsx line 281: only the FIRST guardScope's verdict drives needsReason via onChange — if a 2nd scope is severe but 1st is none, save would not require reason. Consider aggregating verdicts across all guardScopes (max severity wins). Edge case but worth flagging.
ManualJournalForm.jsx: guardScopes useMemo recomputes whenever form.lines OR coas changes — efficient. No issues.
ForecastGuardBanner.jsx: cancellation via lastReqRef.current handles stale responses correctly. Good.
Backend kind='revenue' code path exists in service but no router/UI usage yet — dead code for this iteration but harmless.
Pre-existing console warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' fires on every COA select render — should be cleaned up but is NOT introduced by Phase 7C+.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (severe / none / outlet-scoped severe flows all working; only an unrelated pre-existing console warning)

seed_data_creation: None. Used existing seed_phase7b_demo (240 daily_sales validated, 480 JE). MTD-April expense ~Rp 392.7M consolidated, ~Rp 71.2M Altero — matches agent-to-agent context note.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Forecast Guard is fully functional E2E. Backend 11/11 green; frontend severe/mild/none + outlet-scoped + reason-gated save all verified. Live values from /api/forecasting/guard/check on admin token: consolidated 200M expense -> severe +35.06% (MTD 392.772.000, forecast 438.896.453, ci 8.699.828); Altero 60M expense -> severe +64.94% (MTD 71.229.000, forecast 79.561.923). The only outstanding console warning ('<span> child of <option>') is unrelated, pre-existing across the FinancePortal pages.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found in the new feature. The unrelated console warning RCA: a custom <option> in some <select> contains a <span> wrapper (likely for icon/styling) which violates HTML spec. Search '<span' inside any <option> across the codebase; replace with plain text or use option label attribute.
